residuals.risk: Purchase, loan and asset use have no external authorization or custody receipt.
residuals.stop_condition: No order, loan request, receipt or asset use without explicit authorization.

residuals.risk: Shortlist entries are classes or candidates, not inspected exact assets.
residuals.stop_condition: A placeholder, missing SKU/revision or unsupported exact-match claim fails acceptance.

residuals.risk: Firmware releases and security advisories may change before hardware is available.
residuals.gate_or_task: P1a-01 repin and P1a-02 security preflight
residuals.stop_condition: Floating firmware, missing artifact hash or unreviewed advisory stops flashing/testing.

residuals.risk: Dummy loads, cables, attenuators or enclosure isolation are not inventoried or measured.
residuals.stop_condition: Any intentional radiated TX or unmeasured containment stops P1a.

residuals.risk: Emergency-assumed-risk and jurisdiction validation are not P1a authorizations.
residuals.stop_condition: P1a cannot use regulatory break-glass to authorize radiated TX.

residuals.risk: Human participants and real acoustic captures lack consent/capture authorization.
residuals.stop_condition: No recruitment or real capture without consent, privacy review and responsible reviewer.

residuals.risk: Exact loads, storage unit, temperature, aging and usable Wh are unknown.
residuals.stop_condition: No 72-hour or solar claim before exact characterization and frozen load inventory.

residuals.risk: P0 in-process integration does not establish a distributed physical cell topology.
residuals.stop_condition: No distributed-runtime, capacity or resilience claim before physical topology evidence.
